description:
🕒 16:00–18:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-ikimonobu-tenranzan-summer/

Walk with a guide and discover nature's subtle changes that you might miss on an ordinary stroll. This is a short, relaxed tour that's easy to enjoy. Please feel free to join us. Depending on the season, you may receive homemade pesticide-free vegetables as a gift!

【Fee】
¥2,000 per person; ¥1,500 for repeat visitors; ¥4,000 per family (includes guide and insurance)

【Capacity】
10 people per date

【Guide】
Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno City Eco-Tourism Citizen Guide Group – Wildlife Section)

【What to bring】
Drink, rain gear, backpack or similar (something that keeps both hands free is recommended), towel, insect repellent spray
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
